name: cannon-es

en.when_to_use: Use it to calculate physics when teaching 3D mechanics, collisions, pendulums, inclines, stacking, joints, or vehicles, copying body.position/quaternion to a three.js mesh each frame for rendering; use matter-js/planck instead for purely 2D scenes. Augmentation boundary: cannon only solves physics and performs no rendering, so it must be paired with three.js (already in the catalog).
en.why_valuable: Hand-writing 3D rigid-body physics (broadphase collision detection, constraint solvers, and numerical integration) is almost certain to be wrong or numerically unstable for AI; cannon-es is a mature 3D engine with multiple shapes, constraints/joints/springs, and vehicles, providing stable interactive mechanics simulations in dependency-free pure JS.

data_in.note: This is a scene description that the consuming AI assembles item by item through the API, not one JSON object passed directly to a function. Y is up; gravity is commonly (0,-9.82,0). mass>0 is dynamic, while 0 or type='static' is static.

bodies.mass: number -- >0 is dynamic; 0 or type='static' is static
bodies.shape: { kind:'box', halfExtents:[hx,hy,hz] } | { kind:'sphere', radius } | { kind:'plane' } | { kind:'cylinder', radiusTop, radiusBottom, height, segments }

when_to_use: 教 3D 力学/碰撞/摆/斜面/堆叠/关节/车辆时用它算物理,每帧把 body.position/quaternion 拷给 three.js mesh 渲染;纯 2D 场景用 matter-js/planck、不要用它。augment 边界:cannon 只做物理求解、零渲染,必须配 three.js(目录已有)。
why_valuable: AI 徒手写 3D 刚体物理(broadphase 碰撞检测、约束求解器、数值积分)几乎必错或数值爆炸;cannon-es 是成熟 3D 引擎(多 shape + 约束/关节/弹簧 + 车辆),给稳定可交互的力学模拟,纯 JS 零依赖。

data_in.note: 这是消费 AI 用 API 逐条组装的场景描述,不是单个 JSON 直接喂给某函数。坐标 Y 朝上,gravity 常 (0,-9.82,0);mass>0 为动态,0 或 type='static' 为静态。

_defaults.body.type: 按 mass 判定(>0 动态)

bodies.mass: number —— >0 动态;0 或 type='static' 为静态
bodies.shape: { kind:'box', halfExtents:[hx,hy,hz] } | { kind:'sphere', radius } | { kind:'plane' } | { kind:'cylinder', radiusTop, radiusBottom, height, segments }
bodies.material?: { friction?, restitution? } —— 经 ContactMaterial 生效

provides._note: headless-primitive:纯 JS 3D 物理求解、零渲染、无 L 级、无 carriers 矩阵;每帧读 body.position/quaternion 驱动 three.js。
provides.outputs: world.step()/fixedStep() 后每个 Body 的 position:Vec3 与 quaternion:Quaternion 被就地更新,消费 AI 拷给对应 three.js mesh.position/quaternion。

api_surface.world: new World({gravity:Vec3, allowSleep?}); world.addBody(b); world.step(dt, timeSinceLast?, maxSubSteps?) 或 world.fixedStep()
api_surface.body: new Body({mass, position:Vec3, shape:Shape, type:BODY_TYPES.DYNAMIC|STATIC|KINEMATIC, velocity?}); body.applyImpulse/applyForce
api_surface.shapes: new Box(new Vec3(hx,hy,hz)); new Sphere(r); new Plane(); Cylinder(rt,rb,h,seg); Trimesh; Heightfield

peer.note: cannon 只算物理;three.js 渲染 3D 场景,循环里每帧 world.fixedStep() 后把 body.position/body.quaternion 拷给对应 mesh。

boot.note: cannon-es 零渲染,必须配 three.js(目录已有):循环里 world.fixedStep() 推进,读 body.position(Vec3)/body.quaternion(Quaternion) 同步 mesh.position/quaternion。库本身无 DOM 足迹,故三载体行为一致。

isolation.evidence: +esm named exports 含 World, Body, Box, Sphere, Plane, Cylinder, Vec3, Quaternion, BODY_TYPES, HingeConstraint, RaycastVehicle 等(无 default export)已核。签名取自 dist/cannon-es.d.ts:new World({gravity?:Vec3, allowSleep?...}); world.addBody(Body); world.step(dt, timeSinceLastCalled?, maxSubSteps?) 与 world.fixedStep(dt?, maxSubSteps?); new Body({mass?, position?:Vec3, shape?:Shape, type?:BodyType, velocity?...}); BODY_TYPES.DYNAMIC=1/STATIC=2/KINEMATIC=4(亦 Body.DYNAMIC 静态); new Box(Vec3 halfExtents)/new Sphere(radius)/new Plane()。纯 JS 模拟、零渲染——step 后读 body.position/body.quaternion 驱动 three.js mesh。DOM 足迹:+esm 里唯一的 document.* 是一处 document.createElement('canvas'),落在一个受限 helper(heightfield/数据纹理路径)内,World/Body/step 正常用法从不触及;无 window 监听、无 head/style。headless-primitive,trivially shadow-safe。
